- When I saw the Golden Fish Sign + heard her words I understood (believed - pistis - faith) the truth; that it was at that moment really c. 70 A.D. The medieval archetypal printout view of reality (supra) explains how this could be true; then "Klingsor's magic castle" disappeared - linear time reality lost its power over me - i.e. the world. 70 AD is (as is shown in Ubik) somehow within or underneath the "accidents" which we see; it is at essence level. Back to the view of circular

folder 32 - 008
true actual hidden secret Christian Church and none other. Micro-wave teep transmissions are a mere theory, but the golden fish sign was real, whether arranged by Christian humans or Zebra modulating my experiences into a disinhibiting sequence. Really, all this leads me back to the mimicking entity, which is astounding beyond belief as an object of experience (not to mention all the dreams & visions & hypnagogic oral material).

96 So "3 Stigmata" is not totally the reverse of the true situation. A vast invisible sentient entity is per vading our world, substituting (ah! There's the word!) substituting itself progressively more more, further + further, deeper + deeper, into the core of our world. both in the novel + in our actuality. The sacrament (Eucharist) is described, + the true results (but with the good-bad bipolarity reversed). now, as to the real-s

5

Thus will come to pass the saying that is written: "the meek shall inherit the Earth." They are led to victory (safety) by the resurrected, cosmic Christ, of whose body, they will act in concert as members, their minds replaced - their diverse -pluriform minds- by his one mind. Each of these persons will act as physical extension of him. Each performing the task assigned, as I did in 3-74.

What is not understood by most Christians is that the transformation itself will occur, as in the Eucha

Indexed
9
9

But let us take up the mystery of transubstantiation + "sacred" time. Just as the preist during the e eucharist is Christ, it would follow that, say, someone like Martin Luther King actually was Christ - in terms of "sacred" time.

Then anyone (or even anima) who "goes through the stations" is Christ, even if he himself even does not know it (eg. Pink is '74).

Then my "anamnesis" in 3-74 was the overt birth in me of Christ (the urgrund): it thresholded: Christ as the paraclete didn

20
20

Can it be the He ("St Sophia") will not be born extrenal to us, but of of -in- us? We will begin, one after another, to remember? (ie that we are Him?) I have detected the "with," or "instead" or "is" mystery - it is abalogous to the mystery of the eucharist. Just suppose, though, that my 3-74 experience when to happen to people - ie inner anamnesis - upon meeting -not a human girl- but them? They would disclose the disinhibiting sign, + we would remember - + it would involve them
